pr.title: Record: Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1220 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon optimizer with legal score-first chunked TTT that adapts only on already-scored validation chunks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adaptation trains on validation chunks after scoring them, so the eval phase includes explicit val-only training before each scored chunk.
techniques: Legal score-first chunked TTT under inference_mode
GPTQ-lite stack with VE128, XSA4, Tight SWA
